top_signals.title: Framework Ventures raises $400 million for fourth fund to invest across crypto, AI and robotics
top_signals.summary: The firm also promoted Rajiv Patel-O'Connor to general partner as it expands beyond its traditional crypto focus.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Ex-Apollo CEO Leon Black says Jeffrey Epstein duped him out of more than $60 million
Size’s Express a Stellar bet at Sha Tin
top_signals.summary: RACING in Hong Kong moves to a rare Saturday slot at Sha Tin this weekend, when the action gets underway with an 11-race programme including a couple of contests on the all-weather surface. Unfortunately, rain has reared its ugly head once again in the territory with the forecast of heavy showers and thunderstorms already circling [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Remarks by Commissioner Hoekstra at the ENVI Council
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Luxembourg, 25 Jun 2026 Ladies and gentlemen,
Very good evening, I have been thanking you more often for your tenacity. Thank you very much for being here.
This morning at the doorstep...

top_signals.title: Talents can Dance home on the all-weather
top_signals.summary: SUPPORTERS of top all-weather specialist TALENTS AMBITION may finally have their prayers answered when the striking grey galloper lines up in the Beas River Handicap (1.05pm) over the extended mile. The talented five-year-old has yet to taste success in nine runs this season, despite a strong course and distance record of three wins and six [...]
